---
title: "Accounting for Age Uncertainty in Weights-at-Age Estimation"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Accounting for Age Uncertainty in Weights-at-Age Estimation}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
candidates <- c(
  file.path("doc", "age_error_framework.qmd"),
  file.path("..", "doc", "age_error_framework.qmd"),
  system.file("doc", "age_error_framework.qmd", package = "WtAgeRe")
)
source_file <- candidates[nzchar(candidates) & file.exists(candidates)][1]
if (length(source_file) == 0 || is.na(source_file)) {
  stop("Could not find source document: doc/age_error_framework.qmd")
}

txt <- readLines(source_file, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
yaml_lines <- which(trimws(txt) == "---")
if (length(yaml_lines) >= 2 && yaml_lines[1] == 1) {
  txt <- txt[(yaml_lines[2] + 1):length(txt)]
}

while (length(txt) > 0 && trimws(txt[1]) == "") {
  txt <- txt[-1]
}

cat(txt, sep = "\n")
```
